message:
Merge PR #2045: fix(unsling,prime): add town-level beads fallback for rig-level agents

Bug fix: rig-level agents (polecats, crew) may have hooked HQ beads stored in
townRoot/.beads, not the rig database. Adds fallback search in prime, prime_session,
and unsling to find these cross-database beads.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2045
Author: tfgast
